Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a 5-hour WSHFC homebuyer education seminar and secure primary financing through a WSHFC-approved lender.
Program Description: Provides 3% to 5% of the first mortgage amount at 0% interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Must be combined with a Home Advantage first mortgage.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a 5-hour WSHFC homebuyer education seminar and undergo a lender needs assessment.
Program Description: Offers up to $10,000 at 1% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Designed for buyers earning under $157,100 purchasing homes under $250,000.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a 5-hour WSHFC homebuyer education seminar and secure primary financing through an approved lender.
Program Description: Provides up to $15,000 at 1% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Must be paired with a House Key Opportunity first mortgage.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a WSHFC homebuyer seminar and verify disability status under ADA guidelines or RCW 71A.10.020.
Program Description: Provides up to $15,000 at 1% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years for buyers with a disability or disabled household member.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a WSHFC homebuyer seminar and verify honorable military discharge or veteran status.
Program Description: Provides up to $10,000 at 3% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Eligible veterans must contribute at least $2,500 or 1% of the purchase price.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete WSHFC homebuyer education and verify Washington state residency prior to April 1968 and qualifying racial/ethnic criteria.
Program Description: Provides up to 20% of the home price plus closing costs at 0% interest, deferred until resale or refinance. Forgiven after 5 years if household income is under 80% AMI.

Program Name: East King County Down Payment Assistance Program
Eligible Cities: Beaux Arts Village, Bellevue, Bothell, Clyde Hill, Hunts Point, Issaquah, Kenmore, Kirkland, Medina, Mercer Island, Newcastle, Redmond, Sammamish, Woodinville, Yarrow Point
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete a WSHFC homebuyer seminar in person and a one-on-one pre-purchase housing counseling session.
Program Description: Provides up to $75,000 at 1% simple interest with payments deferred until resale, transfer, or refinance. Requires a minimum 1% buyer contribution.

Program Name: City of Seattle Office of Housing DPA
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete approved pre-purchase education and receive one-on-one counseling from HomeSight or Parkview Services.
Program Description: Provides up to $76,000 at 3% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years for open-market purchases within Seattle city limits.

Program Name: King County Down Payment Assistance Program
Eligible Cities: Auburn, Federal Way, Tukwila, Unincorporated King County
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete HomeSight's educational curriculum and pass a post-closing liquid asset test.
Program Description: Provides up to $45,000 at 3% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Borrowers can secure an additional $25,000 if household income is at or below 60% AMI.

Program Name: Snohomish County Down Payment Assistance Program
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete HomeSight's educational curriculum and obtain a state-licensed home inspection.
Program Description: Provides up to $50,000 at 3% simple interest with payments deferred for 30 years. Borrowers can secure an additional $35,000 if household income is at or below 60% AMI.

Program Name: HomeSight Puget Sound Revolving Loan Fund
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete HomeSight's educational curriculum and financial assessment and contribute at least 1% or $2500
Program Description: An amortizing second mortgage of up to $70,000. Interest is set at 1.5% to 2% above the first mortgage rate. Monthly payments of principal and interest are required.

Program Name: Homestead Community Land Trust Permanent Subsidy
Mandatory Extra Steps: Attend Homestead program orientation and contribute all personal liquid assets exceeding $15000
Program Description: Direct purchase price write-down below 50% of market value. Homebuyer owns the structure and enters a 99-year renewable ground lease with a restricted resale formula.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete HomeSight's financial counseling and verify Black or African American racial eligibility.
Program Description: Provides up to $20,000 at 0% interest, deferred for 30 years or until resale or refinance. Designed for African American moderate-income buyers.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete HomeSight's financial counseling and verify Indigenous or BIPOC racial heritage.
Program Description: Provides a flat $10,000 deferred second mortgage at 0% interest, deferred for 30 years. Can be layered with all other down payment assistance programs.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete approved pre-purchase education and receive specialized HUD-approved housing counseling.
Program Description: Provides up to $110,000 by layering multiple deferred secondary capital sources for low-income households, prioritizing those with developmental disabilities.

Program Name: City of Tacoma Down Payment Assistance
Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete the WSHFC homebuyer course and meet front-end (38%) and back-end (45%) debt-to-income limits.
Program Description: Provides up to $80,000 in a deferred, 0% interest 30-year loan. Repayment in full is triggered by sale, transfer, refinance, or failure to occupy.
Provides up to 2% down payment credit on 3% down payment conventional mortgatge. No payments or repayment required. Maximum loan size of $350,000.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete an approved homebuyer education course if all borrowers are first-time homebuyers.
Program Description: Conventional 3% down payment mortgage program offering reduced private mortgage insurance (PMI) premiums for low-to-moderate income borrowers. PMI can be canceled once 20% equity is reached.

Mandatory Extra Steps: Must complete an approved homebuyer education course if all borrowers are first-time homebuyers.
Program Description: Conventional 3% down payment mortgage program with flexible down payment funding sources and reduced cancelable private mortgage insurance (PMI) premiums for low-to-moderate income borrowers.
